mapper.select: SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0506_01-02#Sql001 */ M.BROKER_CODE , B.COR_SELF_CHECK_ID , A.COR_SORT_NO , A.COR_SELF_CHECK_ITEM_ID , A.COR_SELF_CHECK_ITEM_NAME , C.COR_CONFIRMATION_FLG , C.COR_ANSWER_REASON , C.COR_ANSWER_RESULT , B.COR_MEMO FROM COR_SELF_CHECK_ITEM A , COR_SELF_CHECK B , COR_SELF_CHECK_CONFIRMATION C , MEDIATE_BRANCH M WHERE A.COR_INDICATION_FLG = '1' AND B.COR_ENFORCE_DATE = #{req.registerDate} AND B.COR_BROKER_CODE = M.BROKER_CODE AND B.COR_SELF_CHECK_ID = C.COR_SELF_CHECK_ID AND C.COR_SELF_CHECK_ITEM_ID = A.COR_SELF_CHECK_ITEM_ID AND M.BROKER_CODE = #{req.brokerCode} AND M.BROKER_BRANCH_KIND = '00' ORDER BY A.COR_SORT_NO
